risk.subtitle: Based on policy and environment safeguards.

risk.bgpEnabledDetail: Ensure peer filtering and route policies are defined.
risk.ospfLargeDetail: Validate area design to avoid adjacency issues.
risk.firewallAllowAnyDetail: Allow any-any rules increase attack surface.
risk.natOpenDetail: Open DNAT rules can expose internal services.
risk.vpnNoPskDetail: Provide a strong PSK for IPsec tunnels.
risk.qosEnabledDetail: Ensure queues align with business priorities.
risk.snmpPublicDetail: Change SNMP community to a secure value.

help.title: User Guide
help.subtitle: Documentation, workflows, and operation flow diagrams.

intro.title: Project Introduction
intro.desc: IT Asset Management + Warehouse + CMDB + Maintenance/Repair System.
intro.goal: Goal: Centralize asset data, lifecycle tracking, warehouse history, work order processes, and reporting.
intro.modAssets: Assets — manage IT devices, assign/return, history.
intro.modCmdb: CMDB — CI Types, schema versions, relationships, services.
intro.modMaintenance: Maintenance — work orders, statuses, downtime, cost.
intro.arch: Architecture: Web UI → API Server → PostgreSQL Database
intro.standardProcessFlow: Catalogs → Assets → Stock in → Work Order → Close → Reports

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.desc: 5 basic steps to get started with the system.
quickStart.step1: Step 1: Create catalogs — Go to Catalogs → Create asset types, models, brands.
quickStart.step2: Step 2: Create assets — Go to Assets → Add new, select model/type created.
quickStart.step3: Step 3: Stock in — Go to Warehouse → Create receipt for assets/parts.
quickStart.step4: Step 4: Create Work Order — Go to Maintenance → Open WO for incidents.
quickStart.step5: Step 5: Close & Report — Complete WO, record costs, view reports.

assets.title: Assets
assets.create: Create asset: Assets → Add new → Fill info → Save.
assets.delete: Delete: Admin only. Assets → select → Delete.
assets.assign: Assign: Asset detail → Assign to employee/department.
assets.history: History: Lifecycle tab shows all events.

catalogs.types: Asset types: Catalogs → Manage asset types.
catalogs.models: Models: Catalogs → Add model, assign manufacturer.

warehouse.import: Stock in: Warehouse → Create receipt → Add parts/assets.
warehouse.export: Stock out: Warehouse → Create issue → Select assets.
warehouse.inventory: Inventory: Warehouse → Inventory session → Scan devices.

maintenance.title: Repair (Work Orders)
maintenance.create: Create WO: Maintenance → Add new → Enter title, severity.
maintenance.statuses: Statuses: open → diagnosing → waiting_parts → repaired → closed / canceled.
maintenance.downtime: Downtime: Auto-calculated from WO open to close.
maintenance.cost: Cost: Record repair cost when closing WO.

cmdb.ciTypes: CI Types: CMDB → Types tab → Create new CI type.
cmdb.versions: Versions: Each CI Type has schema versions.
cmdb.attrs: Attributes: Define data fields for CI.
cmdb.instances: CI: Create instance from published CI Type.

reports.title: Reports
reports.filter: Filter: Use filters by status, type, date range.

charts.title: Charts & Statistics

charts.avgTimeDesc: Time from WO open to close by priority level.
charts.mockNote: Illustrative data. Will connect to real API later.

flow.title: Operation Flow Diagrams
flow.repairFlowDesc: Flowchart describing WO processing from start to finish.
flow.sequenceDesc: Sequence diagram: User → Web UI → API → Database.

faq.title: FAQ & Troubleshooting
faq.a1: Check username/password. Contact admin if locked.
faq.a2: Try Ctrl+Shift+R to clear browser cache. Check network connection.
faq.a3: Access depends on role. Contact admin for permissions.
faq.a4: Click the language icon on the Topbar to switch Vietnamese / English.
faq.a5: Check filters, ensure data exists. Retry or contact admin.
faq.a6: Admin can manually change status. Check logs for cause.

admin.label: Admin
admin.goal: Keep the system stable, enforce role-based access, and maintain complete audit trails.

daily.1: Check approval inbox and important notifications.
daily.2: Review new users, reset passwords, and role changes.
daily.3: Review incident dashboard and maintenance trends.
daily.4: Verify sensitive changes in security/audit logs.

control.1: Do not grant permissions above necessity.
control.2: All sensitive actions require justification and audit trail.
control.3: Production changes should pass approval flow.

asset.label: IT Asset Manager
asset.goal: Manage the full asset lifecycle from onboarding and assignment to maintenance and reporting.

daily.1: Update catalogs when new models/vendors appear.
daily.3: Monitor assets waiting for work-order handling.
daily.4: Finalize utilization and asset status reports.

control.1: Asset code and serial must be unique.
control.2: Do not delete assets with transactional history.
control.3: Synchronize asset status with work-order outcomes.

warehouse.label: Warehouse Keeper
warehouse.goal: Keep stock accurate, process inbound/outbound documents correctly, and support work orders on time.

daily.3: Review stock discrepancies and record adjustments.
daily.4: Review parts issue history for work orders.

control.1: Post documents only when line items are complete.
control.2: Every adjustment must have a clear reason.
control.3: Run periodic stock checks by warehouse/part group.

technician.label: Technician
technician.goal: Handle work orders quickly, follow process, and log diagnosis/results completely.

daily.1: Check new work orders by priority.
daily.2: Update work-order status according to real progress.
daily.3: Record used parts/test cost after repair.
daily.4: Sync repair outcomes into asset history.

control.2: Do not close a work order without clear results.

requester.label: Requester/User
requester.goal: Create complete requests, track status, and communicate effectively with processing teams.

daily.1: Create requests with clear description and correct type.
daily.2: Track status and provide extra details when requested.
daily.3: Review assigned assets in My Assets.

control.1: Avoid duplicate requests for the same issue.
control.2: Keep contact and department info updated.
control.3: Read processing outcomes before closing discussion.
